title: Hiring Production Engineer at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises:
Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises!
